name: MRR Financial Model
description: Build SaaS financial models with MRR/ARR projections, unit economics (CAC/LTV/Payback), burn rate analysis, runway calculation, and investor-ready financial reports.
prompt: Build SaaS financial models with MRR/ARR projections, unit economics (CAC/LTV/Payback), burn rate analysis, runway calculation, and investor-ready financial reports for 6-24 month horizons.
